tasks.label: Android: Build & Run (Debug USB)
args: $env:JAVA_HOME = 'C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.10.7-hotspot'; $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT = 'C:\Users\vladi\.bubblewrap\android_sdk'; $env:ANDROID_HOME = 'C:\Users\vladi\.bubblewrap\android_sdk'; $adb = "$env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT\platform-tools\adb.exe"; $usbDevice = (& $adb devices | Select-String '\sdevice$' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[0] } | Where-Object { $_ -notlike 'emulator-*' } | Select-Object -First 1); if (-not $usbDevice) { Write-Host 'No USB device found. Connect phone with USB debugging enabled.' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 }; cd '${workspaceFolder}'; npx cap sync android 2>&1 | Write-Host; cd android; Write-Host 'Building debug APK...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug 2>&1 | Write-Host; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host 'Build failed!' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 }; Write-Host "Installing to USB device $usbDevice..." -ForegroundColor Cyan; & $adb -s $usbDevice install -r app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk 2>&1 | Write-Host; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host 'Install blocked on device. Approve install prompt or allow USB installs in Developer options.' -ForegroundColor Yellow; exit 1 }; Write-Host 'Launching app...' -ForegroundColor Green; & $adb -s $usbDevice shell am start -n com.vladimirgronat.todolist/.MainActivity
